ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the item belongs to */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the item */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the item */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the item */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the item */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the item is featured */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the item was added to the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the category was added to the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behavior_types" (
  "behavior_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior type */,
  "behavior_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the behavior type (e.g., purchase, browse, search) */,
  "behavior_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the behavior type */,
  "is_trackable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the behavior type should be tracked */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the behavior type was added to the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_behavior" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the behavior */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item involved in the behavior */,
  "behavior_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the behavior type (e.g., purchase, browse, search) */,
  "geohash" TEXT /* Geohash location of the user when the behavior occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the behavior occurred */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., mobile, desktop) used by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device analysis */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the behavior event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_behavior_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_behavior_behavior_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("behavior_type_id") REFERENCES behavior_types ("behavior_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_behavior_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_behavior_geohash FOREIGN KEY ("geohash") REFERENCES geohashes ("geohash")
)

CREATE TABLE "geohashes" (
  "geohash_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geohash */,
  "geohash" TEXT /* Geohash value */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geohash location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geohash location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City associated with the geohash */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the geohash */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone associated with the geohash */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geohash_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the recommendation is for */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being recommended */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the recommendation algorithm used */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browsing_history" (
  "browsing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browsing event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who browsed the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being browsed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the browsing occurred */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., mobile, desktop) used by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device analysis */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the browsing event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browsing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browsing_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browsing_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the search query */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the search query was made */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., mobile, desktop) used by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device analysis */,
  "search_results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned for the search query */,
  "search_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the search event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlist" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the item to their wishlist */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the wishlist */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* Date the item was added to the wishlist */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., mobile, desktop) used by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device analysis */,
  "note" TEXT /* Notes added by the user for the wishlist item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlist_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., mobile, desktop) used by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device analysis */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost of the order */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order item */,
  "final_price" REAL /* Final price of the order item after discounts */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the item has been returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)
